name: Magic Peanut Butter Middles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, softened butter (margarine), and 1/4 cup peanut butter until light and fluffy.
3. Add vanilla extract and egg to the mixture; beat well.
4. Stir in the flour mixture until combined.
5. Set aside.
6. In a small bowl, combine the filling ingredients: creamy peanut butter and confectioners' sugar.
7. Roll the filling into 30 balls (about 1 inch diameter).
8. Shape about 1 tablespoon of cookie dough around each peanut butter ball, completely covering it.
9. Place the filled cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Optionally, flatten the cookies slightly with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
11. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 7-9 minutes, or until set and lightly golden. Do not overbake.
12. Makes approximately 30 cookies.
